title: Playing Card Sports Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Playing Card Sports Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic sports fashion portrait inside a Queen of Hearts playing-card design for a Portugal football supporter. Subject: a beautiful blonde adult woman with thoughtful match-day expression stands in a packed stadium VIP section wearing a Portugal red jersey with green trim and number 7, fitted white high-waisted jeans, gold watch, bracelets, and hoop earrings and holding a Portugal flag draped at her side. Scene: a packed football stadium filled with red and green supporters surrounds the subject with supporters, waving flags, bright floodlights, cinematic bokeh, and dramatic match-night atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 playing-card portrait with a rounded inner window, large red queen and heart symbols in opposite corners, sharply focused subject, and stadium depth behind the card frame. Style: Ultra-realistic sports fashion photography with luxury editorial retouching, detailed hair and skin texture, high-contrast stadium lighting, and premium magazine finish. Color Palette: Fixed red, green, white, and gold accents against stadium darkness, bright floodlight highlights, and vivid supporter color. Lighting: Bright stadium floodlights, realistic skin highlights, shallow-depth bokeh sparkle, and crisp editorial contrast. Typography: Queen of Hearts appears only through clean playing-card corner symbols and rank styling, integrated into the card frame. Signature Elements: Queen of Hearts frame, football stadium VIP section, Portugal supporter styling, flag prop, red heart symbols, and magazine-like sports fashion polish. Restrictions: Keep the portrait readable, frame clean, text minimal, logo-safe, watermark-free, and free of distorted hands, faces, and card symbols.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
